on:

    branches: [main, master]

    branches: [main, master]
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 9 * * 1'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:

        description: Output format (markdown or json)

        description: Fail the job when expired secrets are present
        required: false
        default: 'false'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  CONFIG_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.config || 'fixtures/secrets.json' }}
  WARNING_WINDOW_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.warning_window_days || '14' }}
  NOW_OVERRIDE: ${{ github.event.inputs.now || '' }}
  REPORT_FORMAT: ${{ github.event.inputs.format || 'markdown' }}
  FAIL_ON_EXPIRED: ${{ github.event.inputs.fail_on_expired || 'false' }}

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = './SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config

  validate:
    name: Validate secret rotation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: unit-tests
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run secret rotation validator
        id: validate
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
          . ./SecretRotationValidator.ps1
          $params = @{
              ConfigPath        = $env:CONFIG_PATH
              Format            = $env:REPORT_FORMAT
              WarningWindowDays = [int]$env:WARNING_WINDOW_DAYS
              PassThru          = $true
          }
          if ($env:NOW_OVERRIDE) {
              $params.Now = [datetime]::Parse($env:NOW_OVERRIDE, [System.Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)
          }
          if ($env:FAIL_ON_EXPIRED -eq 'true') {
              $params.FailOnExpired = $true
          }
          $result = Invoke-SecretRotationValidator @params
          Write-Host '----- BEGIN REPORT -----'
          Write-Host $result.Output
          Write-Host '----- END REPORT -----'
          Write-Host ("SUMMARY total={0} expired={1} warning={2} ok={3}" -f `
              $result.Report.summary.total,
              $result.Report.summary.expired,
              $result.Report.summary.warning,
              $result.Report.summary.ok)
          if ($result.ExitCode -ne 0) {
              Write-Error "Validator returned non-zero exit code $($result.ExitCode)"
              exit $result.ExitCode
          }

name: Secret Rotation Validator

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 9 * * 1'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      config:
        description: Path to the secrets configuration JSON
        required: false
        default: fixtures/secrets.json
      warning_window_days:
        description: Warning window in days
        required: false
        default: '14'
      now:
        description: Override "now" (yyyy-MM-dd) for deterministic runs
        required: false
        default: ''
      format:
        description: Output format (markdown or json)
        required: false
        default: markdown
      fail_on_expired:
        description: Fail the job when expired secrets are present
        required: false
        default: 'false'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = './SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config

  validate:
    name: Validate ${{ matrix.case }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: unit-tests
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - case: all-ok
            fixture: fixtures/all-ok.json
            format: json
          - case: mixed-json
            fixture: fixtures/mixed.json
